dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7895 IH: PBM Kickback Prohibition Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Allen introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To amend section 408 of the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974 to prohibit kickbacks to pharmacy benefit managers.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the PBM Kickback Prohibition Act.

subsection.text: Section 408(b)(2)(B) of the Employee Retirement Income Security Act (29 U.S.C. 1108(b)(2)(B)) is amended by adding at the end the following:

clause.text: In the case of a contract or arrangement between a covered plan and a covered service provider for pharmacy benefit management services, no amount of compensation may be paid, directly or indirectly, by such service provider to a brokerage firm, broker, consultant, advisor, or any other individual for the referral of the covered plan’s or health insurance issuer's business to the covered service provider.

subsection.text: The amendment made by this section shall apply for plan years beginning after the date of enactment of this Act.
